articles.title: Thousands of ‘Pokémon Go’ Players Descend on Times Square to Defeat Mewtwo - WIRED
articles.description: A surprise 10th-anniversary event saw Niantic fulfilling a promise teased in the original 2016 launch trailer for its popular mobile game.

articles.title: iRacing set to increase subscription costs - Traxion.GG
articles.description: iRacing will increase the cost of all its subscription plans this coming August.

articles.title: Google starts rolling out local Documents backup on Android, lets you turn off SMS & RCS - 9to5Google
articles.description: Google is rolling out new settings to control whether RCS messages are backed up. Android is beginning to roll out local Documents backup.

articles.title: Layoffs Hit GameSpot Again - Aftermath
articles.description: It's the fifth round of layoffs since the company was purchased by Fandom

articles.title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead - The Verge
articles.description: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it.

articles.title: Health trackers offer a ton of data. Here are the metrics doctors want you to pay attention to - vox.com
articles.description: We’re all wearing health trackers and wearables. Are the heart and health data they’re collecting actually helping us to live longer?
